reviews.title: Durable, powerful, reasonably priced
reviews.text: I got this for my dad and he jams out and takes it with him EVERYWHERE! Where we found it (in a ditch like 10 ft from the road) it had to have bounced off of my car that was doing anywhere from 30-40 mph at the time, and it still works like new!!

reviews.author: Grooster

reviews.title: Bad Sound Quality
reviews.text: I purchased this speaker because a friend had the same model and I was impressed with the sound quality.  The one I received sounded like an old clock radio immediately upon using. Even after a charge, the speaker sounds awful. No particular type of music sounds good on this speaker, even at a low volume. I suppose that you get what you pay for, though I have since replaced this speaker with a cheaper brand and the sound quality greatly exceeds this particular speaker. The rubber casing on this speaker is also flawed, rendering the charger port cover useless.

reviews.title: Light weight and portable
reviews.text: Packaged for shipping horribly, speaker is held in plastic and BB choose to ship it in a bag, well how do you think this arrived?  Smashed up, was a gift so that sucked. No damage to speaker tho.  But really think about using a box next time.  Speaker is pretty good, sound is good, lights are cool, but where are the directions, or guidance for waterproof speaker, what not to do?  Came with round cards that really say nothing.   Awesome that it will charge phone etc on top.  Happy with item, not happy with BB

With it's size, this small to medium size Altec Lansing Bluetooh Speaker is so powerful!. Very sensitive when connecting, very sharp, crisp & clear audio or sound with good Sound boost or vibes.

Color black & blue combination of its finish look makes it more attractive & is ready bluetooth holder at its bottom side or base.

I put it on an optiona tripod & the more it looks great and the audio or sound is much amplified.

Lastly, got it at promo price of $69.99 from $129.99!

So check out from yourself! I highly recommend this item!

reviews.title: this is an awesome product, great sound
reviews.text: This is an awesome product, great sound, long lasting battery. We bought some others, but they didn't last very long, they just stopped working, so I thought I would try a different brand this time. This is actually our 2nd one and we each have our own now. I would recommend this product. I was looking for maybe something different and then Best Buy sent me a notice that it was almost 1/2 off and I bought it.

reviews.title: Poor sound quality, nice features - took forever
reviews.text:
Product was originally scheduled to arrive within 10 days of the order - took close to a month maybe more.
Speaker has nice features such as cell phone charging by laying it on top of the speaker.
Sound quality is really very disappointing. Had hoped for at least decent sound from Altec Lansing but they could not deliver.
Likely would not have purchased if it had not been at a big discount

The wireless charging is a nice feature. seemed slow but that may be because i have a heavy duty case on my phone, I don't have a lot of experience with wireless chargers. I love this little speaker and think its a good valur for the money.

reviews.title: Works great! Looks great!
